name: scTenifoldpy Virtual Gene Knockout
description: Virtual gene knockout analysis using scTenifoldpy (scTenifoldKnk) to estimate downstream transcriptional perturbations from single-cell RNA-seq data. Accepts h5ad inputs, performs basic QC, builds manifold-aligned GRNs, and reports perturbation scores for the specified knockout genes.

ko_genes.description: Comma-separated gene symbols to virtually knock out (e.g., 'TP53,EGFR')

n_components.description: Number of manifold components used by scTenifoldpy tensor decomposition

qc_min_lib_size.description: Minimum library size used in QC filters

qc_min_percent.description: Minimum percent expression threshold for QC filtering

max_genes.description: Maximum number of highly variable genes to keep (top variance)

file.description: Single-cell RNA-seq data in h5ad format. Expression matrix should be counts or normalized values in X.

output_config.collection_description: Outputs virtual knockout perturbation scores, ranked gene changes, top 10 up/down-regulated genes visualization, detailed statistics summary, and run diagnostics.

items.description: Per-gene perturbation scores produced by scTenifoldpy for the requested knockout genes. Columns include 'Gene', 'Distance', 'boxcox-transformed distance', 'Z' (Z-score), 'FC' (fold change), 'p-value', and 'adjusted p-value'.
Horizontal bar chart visualization showing top 10 up-regulated (red bars, positive Z-score) and top 10 down-regulated (blue bars, negative Z-score) genes, excluding the knocked-out genes.

Detailed text summary report containing analysis parameters, dataset information, knocked-out genes, top 10 up/down-regulated genes with statistics, and summary statistics including mean/median Z-scores and significant gene counts.
